home.hero_subtitle: Manage expenses, accounts, cards, wallets, and currencies — all in one place, offline and cloud-free.
home.features_subtitle: Built for those who want precision and privacy in their finances.
home.feature_accounts_desc: Cards, wallets, banks, and cash in one dashboard. Customizable colors and icons.
home.feature_transactions_desc: Log income, expenses, and transfers in seconds. Advanced search and filters.
home.feature_categories_desc: Organize your movements with custom categories and icons. Hierarchy and colors.
home.feature_reports_desc: Category charts, monthly bars, net worth line, and rankings. 5 different views.
home.feature_debts_desc: Track what you owe and what's owed to you. Partial payments with editable history.
home.feature_investments_desc: Stocks, crypto, bonds, ETFs, and more. Automatic ROI and evolution charts.
home.feature_offline_desc: No account, no cloud, no network permissions. Your data stays on your device.
home.feature_currencies_desc: Manage accounts in different currencies with your own exchange rates.
home.feature_backup_desc: Export and import your data as JSON. Take your finances anywhere.
home.how_it_works_subtitle: Three steps to full control of your finances.
home.step1_desc: Install the APK directly on your Android. No Play Store, no account, no extra steps.
home.step2_desc: Add your cards, wallets, and bank accounts. Set up the currencies you use.
home.step3_desc: Log every transaction, review your reports, and keep your balance up to date.
home.final_cta_subtitle: Mis Gastos is 100% offline. No subscription, no cloud data, no restrictions.

features_page.title: Features
features_page.subtitle: Explore every feature of Mis Gastos in detail.
features_page.accounts_subtitle: All your payment methods in one panel
features_page.accounts_desc: Manage debit and credit cards, digital wallets, bank accounts, and cash from a single screen. Each account has its own color, icon, and currency.
features_page.accounts_bullet2: Customizable color and icon per account
features_page.transactions_desc: Record income, expenses, and transfers quickly. Filter by date, account, category, or type. Edit or delete any movement from history.
features_page.transactions_bullet2: Filters by date, account, category and type
features_page.transactions_bullet4: Edit and delete with full history
features_page.categories_desc: Create your own categories with a name, color, and icon. Assign them to any transaction for precise analysis in reports.
features_page.currencies_desc: Set up the currencies you use with your exchange rates. Each account can have its own currency and Mis Gastos converts automatically when calculating total net worth.
features_page.currencies_bullet4: Total net worth in base currency
features_page.reports_desc: Reports turn your data into clear charts. Five tabs: expenses by category (pie), monthly evolution (bars), net worth (line), expense ranking, and trend.
features_page.reports_bullet1: Pie chart by category with percentages
features_page.reports_bullet3: Net worth line chart over time
features_page.reports_bullet5: Filters by account, date, and type
features_page.debts_subtitle: What you owe and what's owed to you
features_page.debts_desc: Record loans and debts with partial payment tracking. Always know how much is outstanding and the full history of each payment.
features_page.debts_bullet1: Debts in your favor and against
features_page.investments_desc: Track stocks, cryptocurrencies, bonds, fixed deposits, ETFs, and more. ROI is calculated automatically and you can view portfolio evolution over time.
features_page.investments_bullet1: Types: stocks, crypto, bonds, ETFs, fixed deposits
features_page.backup_desc: Export your entire database to a JSON file and restore it whenever you want. Compatible with the Android file system to save wherever suits you best.
features_page.backup_bullet1: Export to JSON with one tap
features_page.backup_bullet3: Includes accounts, transactions, categories, debts, and investments
features_page.backup_bullet4: No external server or account required
features_page.ota_desc: Check for a new version directly from the app. Download and install the update without leaving Mis Gastos.
features_page.ota_bullet3: No Play Store or external stores

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.subtitle: Install Mis Gastos directly on your Android device.
downloads.android_desc: Direct install. Google Play not required.
downloads.install_warning: Enable "Install from unknown sources" in Settings > Security before installing.
downloads.docs_es_desc: Full Spanish guide — 11 sections, with screenshots and examples.
downloads.docs_en_desc: Complete English guide — 11 sections, with screenshots and examples.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Explore everything Mis Gastos has to offer.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Guides, tutorials, and reference to get the most out of the app.
docs.index_subtitle: Everything you need to manage your personal finances with the app.
docs.index_footer_note: Found an error or something unclear? Contact us through the contact section.
docs.section_01-introduccion_desc: Download the app, set up your first accounts, and understand how Mis Gastos works.
docs.section_02-cuentas_desc: Create cards, wallets, bank accounts, and cash. Customize color, icon, and currency.
docs.section_03-transacciones_desc: Log income, expenses, and transfers. Cross-currency handling included.
docs.section_04-categorias_desc: Organize your movements with your own categories, colors, and icons.
docs.section_05-monedas_desc: Set up multiple currencies and define conversion rates for your net worth.
docs.section_06-informes_desc: Five analysis views: categories, monthly, net worth, ranking, and by person.
docs.section_07-deudas_desc: Record what you owe and what's owed to you. Partial payments and full tracking.
docs.section_08-inversiones_desc: Track stocks, crypto, bonds, and more. Automatic ROI and portfolio evolution.
docs.section_09-backup_desc: Export and import your database as JSON. Your data always safe.
docs.section_10-actualizaciones_desc: Update the app directly from itself, no Play Store required.
docs.section_11-faq_desc: Answers to the most common questions about the app, data, and configuration.
